channel.title: Gheware DevOps AI Blog
channel.description: Kubernetes tutorials, Docker guides, CI/CD best practices, AI agent engineering, and cloud-native insights for DevOps engineers.

item.title: Agentic AI Incident Response: The Autonomous SRE in 2026
item.description: Explore how agentic AI transforms SRE workflows in 2026, reducing MTTR by 60% through autonomous Kubernetes operations and predictive remediation.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: MLOps on Kubernetes: From Notebook to Production Endpoint
item.description: Learn how to deploy MLOps models on Kubernetes in 2026. Discover best practices for scaling, security, and managing inference endpoints in enterprise environments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Scaling RAG Pipeline Production Scaling 2026
item.description: A senior DevOps engineer’s guide to scaling RAG pipelines in 2026. Covers vector DB tuning, caching strategies, and Kubernetes deployment patterns for production-grade.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes Security Hardening: A CKS-Grade Checklist for 2026
item.description: Master Kubernetes security hardening for the CKS 2026 exam. Learn concrete steps for node security, RBAC, network policies, and runtime protection.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Cutting LLM Inference Costs in the Enterprise: A 2026 Playbook
item.description: Reduce LLM cost optimization enterprise inference 2026 with proven techniques: model quantization, intelligent routing, and observability for lower latency and spend.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Observability in Production 2026
item.description: Master AI agent observability in production 2026. Learn tracing, metrics, and debugging strategies for non-deterministic LLM workflows in enterprise Kubernetes.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Platform Engineering vs DevOps 2026: The Reality
item.description: Platform engineering vs DevOps 2026: Why self-service platforms and agentic AI are replacing manual toil. A practitioner’s view on building internal developer.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes Cost Optimization Enterprise 2026
item.description: Stop bleeding money on Kubernetes. Learn concrete strategies for enterprise cost optimization in 2026, including spot instance management and AI-driven autoscaling.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Internal Developer Platform Backstage 2026
item.description: Building an internal developer platform with Backstage in 2026 requires shifting from passive catalogs to active, agentic workflows. Here is the practitioner’s guide.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Scaling RAG Pipelines to Production: Hard Truths
item.description: Learn how to scale RAG pipelines to production in 2026. Practical advice on latency, vector DBs, and agentic workflows from a veteran DevOps engineer.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Cutting LLM Inference Costs in the Enterprise: A 2026 Playbook
item.description: Reduce enterprise LLM inference costs in 2026 using quantization, speculative decoding, and intelligent routing. A hands-on guide for DevOps and AI engineers.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Multi-Cluster GitOps at Scale: Patterns That Survive Productio
item.description: Stop wrestling with multi-cluster Kubernetes deployments. Learn production-tested GitOps patterns for ArgoCD, Flux, and policy enforcement at scale.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AIOps Self-Healing Kubernetes: Guide 2026
item.description: AIOps self-healing Kubernetes platforms detect, diagnose, and auto-remediate failures. Enterprise patterns, code examples, and implementation roadmap.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Governance Frameworks: CTO Playbook 2026
item.description: From trust-by-design to governance-as-code, enterprise AI agents need formal guardrails. Explore the five governance frameworks every CTO must implement in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Multi-Agent AI in Kubernetes: 2026 Enterprise Guide
item.description: Deploy production multi-agent AI systems on Kubernetes with LangGraph, A2A, and MCP. Enterprise patterns, scaling, and safety for 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Top Kubernetes GPU Tools for AI Acceleration 2026
item.description: The top Kubernetes GPU tools for AI acceleration in 2026. GPU Operator, KServe, KEDA, Volcano, DRA — complete enterprise implementation guide with code examples.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Build a Production RAG Pipeline on Kubernetes (2026 Guide)
item.description: Skip the proof-of-concept traps. Production-tested RAG on Kubernetes: vector DB selection, retrieval tuning, and 7 scaling patterns that actually work in production.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agents on Kubernetes: Enterprise Production Patterns 2026
item.description: Deploy AI agents on Kubernetes with enterprise patterns for security, scaling, and cost optimization. Production guide from 25+ years experience.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI-Native Kubernetes Observability 2026
item.description: Kubernetes clusters waste 5% GPU on average. Learn how Metoro, Robusta KRR, and AI-native observability tools detect and fix resource waste automatically
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Guardrails: Production Enterprise Safety Guide 2026
item.description: Learn how to implement AI agent guardrails for enterprise production environments. Practical patterns for safety, security, and reliable autonomous operations.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Langfuse vs LangSmith vs Arize: LLM Observability 2026
item.description: Compare Langfuse, LangSmith, and Arize for enterprise LLM observability in 2026. Features, pricing, tracing, evals, and the right tool for your AI team.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Self-Healing DevOps: How AI Agents Fix Infrastructure at 3 AM
item.description: AI-powered self-healing infrastructure is going mainstream in 2026. Learn how enterprises deploy autonomous agents that detect, diagnose, and resolve incidents — with production patterns from JPMorgan-grade systems.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: MCP Is the USB-C of AI: Why Every Enterprise Needs It
item.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is the USB-C for AI agents. Learn how enterprises deploy it for secure, governed tool integration — production patterns from JPMorgan-grade deployments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agents Managing Kubernetes: From Autonomous Healing to Self-Governing Clusters in 2026
item.description: AI agents now operate as 24/7 junior DevOps engineers inside Kubernetes, diagnosing CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled and network failures and remediating them. Guide to 5 production patterns, KAITO setup and a 7-step governance framework.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: From Pilot To Production Why Agentic Ai Fails 2026
item.description: Only a small fraction of Agentic AI pilots reach production. Learn the 7 failure patterns and how to fix them with LangGraph, MCP, and production-grade observability. Based on enterprise deployment experience.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: K8sGPT: AI SRE Copilot for Kubernetes
item.description: K8sGPT brings AI root cause analysis to Kubernetes - diagnosing CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, and 50+ failure modes. Operators, custom analyzers, enterprise patterns.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Benchmarking Guide 2026
item.description: Stop guessing which AI agent wins. Enterprise benchmarking guide with 7 dimensions, cost metrics, and production tests for build vs buy decisions.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Governance Readiness Checklist: The 10-Point Framework Every Enterprise CTO Needs in 2026
item.description: From audit trails to kill switches, RBAC to EU AI Act compliance — the 10-point checklist that determines whether your AI agent deployment avoids the front page of WSJ. Built from gheWARE's work with Fortune 500 engineering teams.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Debugging AI Agents in Production: Enterprise SRE Guide 2026
item.description: Traditional logs fail AI agents. Learn distributed tracing, Langfuse observability, and SRE techniques to debug production AI agents.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Security: Enterprise Patterns
item.description: Zero-trust architecture for AI agents: network policies, syscall filtering, seccomp, Kubernetes sandboxing, and MCP server hardening in production.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: KAITO: Kubernetes AI Toolchain Operator — The Enterprise Guide to Deploying LLM AI Models in 2026
item.description: Discover how KAITO (Kubernetes AI Toolchain Operator) enables enterprise teams to deploy, scale, and manage production LLM AI workloads on Kubernetes. Complete implementation guide with architecture patterns, YAML examples, and real-world use cases for 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangGraph Multi-Agent Orchestration 2026: Complete Enterprise Guide [7 Patterns]
item.description: LangGraph multi-agent orchestration 2026: Build scalable AI agent systems with Kubernetes. 7 production patterns from JPMorgan architect. Code examples + deployment templates inside →
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Build Your Enterprise AI Control Plane
item.description: Deploying AI agents without a control plane invites runaway costs, security breaches, and compliance failures. Learn the production architecture.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: [POST_TITLE]
item.description: [POST_DESCRIPTION - 150-160 chars for optimal display]
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: OpenTelemetry for AI Agents: Production Observability Guide 2026
item.description: Instrument AI agents with OpenTelemetry in production. LLM span tracing, multi-agent workflows, and Grafana Tempo setup for enterprise DevOps teams.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Enterprise Agentic AI Playbook 2026
item.description: Step-by-step playbook: How Fortune 500 enterprises deploy AI agent swarms on Kubernetes. Covers MCP security, multi-agent orchestration, and ROI measurement.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes for GenAI: Production Architecture Patterns 2026
item.description: Production Kubernetes architectures for GenAI workloads. GPU scheduling, KServe inference serving, KEDA autoscaling, and security patterns from enterprise deployments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Self-Healing DevOps Pipelines: How AI Agents Are Replacing Your On-Call Engineers (2026)
item.description: Your CI/CD pipeline just fixed itself before you noticed it broke. Here's how AI-powered self-healing DevOps works — with working code for autonomous incident response, AI-driven root cause analysis, and proactive pipeline recovery.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration on Kubernetes: Production Patterns for 2026
item.description: Enterprise guide to orchestrating multi-agent AI systems on Kubernetes. Production patterns, deployment strategies, security, and observability for 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangGraph StateGraph: Beginner's Guide to AI Agent Workflows 2026
item.description: LangGraph StateGraph is the foundation of every production AI agent. Learn nodes, edges, state management, and conditional routing from first principles — with complete runnable Python examples.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Build vs Buy AI Agents: The Enterprise Decision Framework 2026
item.description: Should your enterprise build AI agents with LangGraph or buy a vendor solution? The 5-factor decision framework to make the right call — with total cost of ownership analysis.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) Complete Guide 2026
item.description: LCEL is the composable interface that makes LangChain production-ready. Learn pipe syntax, parallel chains, streaming, fallbacks, and the patterns that separate toy demos from real AI agents.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Ollama Local LLM Development Guide 2026: Run AI Agents Without the Cloud
item.description: Ollama lets you run Llama 3, Mistral, and Phi-3 locally with zero API cost. Complete guide to model selection, LangChain integration, multi-model switching, and production-quality local LLM development patterns.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Prompt Injection Attacks on AI Agents: Threats, Patterns, and Defences
item.description: Prompt injection is the #1 security risk for AI agents in production. Learn direct injection, indirect injection via tool outputs, and the 4 defence layers every enterprise AI agent needs.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: FastAPI for AI Agents: Production Deployment Patterns That Scale
item.description: FastAPI is the standard for deploying AI agents as production APIs. Learn async endpoints, streaming responses, background tasks, health checks, and Docker deployment patterns with complete code examples.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Embeddings Explained: The Math-Free Guide Every AI Engineer Needs
item.description: Embeddings are the foundation of RAG, semantic search, and agent memory. Learn what they are, how to choose embedding models, and how to avoid the top 3 production mistakes.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangFuse in Production: Tracing, Evaluation, and Cost Tracking for AI Agents
item.description: LangFuse is the open-source observability layer every production AI agent needs. Step-by-step guide to tracing LangChain agents, setting up evals, and tracking LLM costs per workflow.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: The Supervisor Pattern: How to Orchestrate Multi-Agent Teams with LangGraph
item.description: The supervisor pattern is the production standard for multi-agent AI systems. Learn how one orchestrator agent routes work to specialist agents — with real LangGraph code and failure modes.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Human-in-the-Loop AI: 4 LangGraph Patterns That Keep Humans in Control
item.description: Fully autonomous AI agents fail on edge cases. Learn the 4 human-in-the-loop patterns in LangGraph — approval gates, interrupt-and-resume, confidence thresholds, and escalation chains.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Guardrails for AI Agents: How to Stop Your LLM from Going Rogue in Production
item.description: Without guardrails, AI agents hallucinate, leak data, and take catastrophic actions. Learn how to implement input/output validation, NeMo Guardrails, and constitutional AI constraints.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)
